source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Elegant condensed display type for velocity moments, Inter or Geist for precise product UI, Geist Mono for tabular telemetry, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, labels, statuses, and dashboard data.
layout: Crisp dashboard grids, compact precision navigation, feather-arc dividers, wing-blur texture, 8px radii, velocity focus rings, emerald primary actions, ruby alert flashes, and pearl-grey cloud-forest surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent hummingbird wing motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Wing transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated hummingbird wing blur motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single elegant hummingbird wing pair and small implied shoulder joint in high-speed hovering motion, macro natural detail, translucent emerald and smoky grey feather planes, precise radial feather structure, aerodynamic blur arcs, one small ruby iridescent flash near the throat-side base, cloud-forest mist sheen, sharp leading edges with soft motion trails. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full wing blur silhouette without cropping, horizontal three-quarter angle, graceful fast precision. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Constraints: do not include a full bird body, flowers, leaves, sky, second animal, UI, logo, text, watermark, cast shadow, contact shadow, or reflection. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Wing light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent hummingbird wing blur motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Hummingbird Wing", derived from the visible transparent hummingbird wing blur cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Hummingbird Wing, Hummingbird Wing, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from emerald iridescent coverts, translucent grey feather blur, ruby flash at the wing base, cloud forest mist, smoky feather shadows, and fast precision hovering motion. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and sample product panels. Typography guidance: include English guidance for fast precision workflows and Japanese guidance labeled Japanese Typography / Japanese, with clean sans UI, elegant condensed display, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP support. Style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible fast precision system, crisp airy grid, 8px radius, feather-arc separators, velocity focus rings, cloud-mist light surfaces, pearl grey cards, emerald primary actions, ruby alert/action flash, cool graphite text, subtle wing-blur texture, and precise instrument-like controls. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue/purple gradient, no one-note palette. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hummingbird Wing" or "Hummingbird Wing", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Wing dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent hummingbird wing motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Hummingbird Wing". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible hummingbird wing blur cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Hummingbird Wing, Hummingbird Wing, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage. Visual details: dark background derived from graphite feather shadow and cloud-forest night; foreground from pearl mist and pale grey feather light; primary actions from emerald iridescence; accent/action flash from ruby throat glint; surfaces from smoky graphite and deep green-black; borders from translucent feather-vein grey; subtle wing-blur texture and mist overlays. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar and top navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, and sample usage cards. Typography guidance: include English guidance for fast precision workflows and Japanese guidance labeled Japanese Typography / Japanese, with clean sans UI, elegant condensed display, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP support. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue/purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hummingbird Wing" or "Hummingbird Wing", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
